summary: Plan-only remediation assessment for five unrelated open PRs. No merge_candidate is safe because none has complete merge preflight with known mergeability, hydrated discussion/review-bot proof, and Codex /review evidence. Several items also have explicit waiting-on-author labels, failing checks, compatibility/session-risk labels, or broad deltas, so maintainer follow-up or narrower repair jobs are required per item.

actions.reason: Potentially useful small contributor PR, but merge is blocked by missing complete preflight, unknown mergeability, and failing hydrated CI entries. A separate repair/revalidation pass can likely handle it, but this shard cannot recommend merge.
Small and plausibly mergeable, but the waiting-on-author label plus missing discussion/review preflight make this a maintainer decision before merge.
The implementation is focused and tests pass, but compatibility risk, waiting-on-author status, unknown mergeability, and missing review/comment preflight require maintainer review before merge.

Do not merge with failing proof/checks and missing review preflight. This is a candidate for a narrow repair/revalidation job, but this shard contains unrelated PRs and should not create a combined fix artifact.

Broad session-state/message-delivery change with active waiting-on-author status and failing dependency guard checks. This needs maintainer review or a dedicated repair job, not merge recommendation from this shard.

needs_human: #81731: missing complete merge preflight, unknown mergeability, and failing hydrated CI entries despite focused scope.
